CustomField.description: 7. In all addresses, made "StateOrProvince" optional 8. In all addresses, updated length restriction of "StateOrProvince" from exact length of 60 characters to max length of 60 characters
CustomField.inlineHelpText: 7. In all addresses, made "StateOrProvince" optional 8. In all addresses, updated length restriction of "StateOrProvince" from exact length of 60 characters to max length of 60 characters
CustomField.label: StateOrProvince_AddressPart1
